log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.

→ melee_spell attack: [d20:20+3=23 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 11casting_mod force damage. Triton — Armored Tank HP: NaN/59
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Triton — Armored Tank.
→ Triton — Armored Tank: DEX save [d20:11+7=18 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.

→ 3/5 targets affected.
